turns.content:
Bạn là subagent **gsd-planner**. Nhiệm vụ: tạo PLAN.md chi tiết cho Phase 23, goal-backward verified.

## Artifacts Input

Đọc TẤT CẢ các file sau trước khi plan:

1. `.planning/phases/23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs/23-SPEC.md` — 7 requirements (P23-01 đến P23-07)
2. `.planning/phases/23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs/23-CONTEXT.md` — 5 decisions đã lock
3. `.planning/phases/23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs/23-RESEARCH.md` — SDK types verified, code change points
4. `.planning/phases/23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs/23-PATTERNS.md` — 20 files classified, templates mapped
5. `.planning/phases/23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs/23-CONTEXT-ANALYSIS-2026-05-22.md` — user deep analysis
6. `.hivemind/synthesis/report-synthesis-2026-05-23.md` — GSD/OMO pattern synthesis

## Constraints

- **MUST use wave-based execution** — 5 waves như SPEC section 8
- **Wave 1 trước, các wave sau có thể parallel** trong giới hạn 2 parallel task
- **P0 fixes (broken paths, allowed-tools gap, power-on trim) là subtask của Wave 3**
- **Mỗi task phải traceable tới SPEC requirement** (P23-01 đến P23-07)
- **Mỗi wave phải có verification command**

## Output

Viết PLAN.md vào `.planning/phases/23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs/PLAN.md`:

```markdown
# Phase 23 Execution Plan

## Goal
Phase 23 đạt completion khi: [...]

## Wave Dependency Graph
[visual/graph of wave dependencies]

## Wave 1: Notification Architecture Fix (P23-01, P23-02)
[MAP: research → pattern → spec → task]

### Task 1.1: Update session-api.ts
- WHAT: expose `noReply` parameter on sendPrompt()
- FILE: src/shared/session-api.ts
- SPEC: P23-01
- RESEARCH: line Y
- PATTERN: notification-handler pattern
- VERIFY: npx vitest run tests/lib/shared/session-api.test.ts

### Task 1.2: Fix notification-handler.ts
- WHAT: add `synthetic: true` to parts at 2 sites + implement reactivateSessionStream() + STALL_TIMEOUT
- FILE: src/coordination/completion/notification-handler.ts
- SPEC: P23-01, P23-02
- RESEARCH: lines 179-182, 231
- PATTERN: execute-slash-command synthetic dispatch
- VERIFY: npx vitest run tests/lib/coordination/completion/notification-handler.test.ts

### Task 1.3: Update tests
- WHAT: add synthetic:true assertion
- FILE: tests/lib/coordination/completion/notification-handler.test.ts
- VERIFY: npx vitest run

[repeat for each wave...]

## Wave 2: Surface Documentation

### Task 2.1: Create hm-l3-tool-surface-documentation
### Task 2.2: Create hm-l3-injection-delivery-patterns

## Wave 3: Skill Restructure (3 sub-waves)

### Wave 3A: Coordination Skills (6)
### Wave 3B: Foundation (1 - power-on)
### Wave 3C: Audit Skills (8)

## Wave 4: Assessment

## Wave 5: Gatekeeping

## Success Criteria
[list of PASS conditions, mapped to SPEC requirements]
```

## Critical Details từ Research & Pattern Mapping

**Wave 1 code changes:**
- notification-handler.ts:179-182 (notifyParentSession) — add synthetic:true + noReply:true
- notification-handler.ts:231 (notifyDelegationTerminal) — add synthetic:true + noReply:true  
- Cần thêm `STALL_TIMEOUT_MS = 60000` constant
- Cần thêm `reactivateSessionStream()` function — gửi empty synthetic:true prompt
- session-api.ts: sendPrompt() — expose noReply parameter
- message-capture.ts:356 — KHÔNG cần thay đổi (đã filter đúng)
- Tests: thêm synthetic:true assertion vào notification-handler.test.ts
- detector.ts, plugin.ts — KHÔNG cần thay đổi

**P0 fixes (trong Wave 3A):**
- coordinating-loop: 6 broken `<files_to_read>` paths (`hm-coordinating-loop` → `hm-l2-coordinating-loop`)
- coordinating-loop: allowed-tools missing 7+ tools
- power-on: trim redundant Section 7 (~30 lines)

**Pattern templates cho skills:**
- ORCHESTRATION template: hm-l2-phase-execution (hiện tại)
- REFERENCE template: hm-l3-hivemind-engine-contracts
- WORKFLOW template: hm-l2-debug

**Yêu cầu mỗi skill:**
- THIN nhưng DEEP — dùng references/assets thay vì inline content
- Conditional loading references đến skill khác
- JUMP LINKS phải verify hoạt động (user report chúng KO work ở runtime)

## PLANNING COMPLETE

**Phase:** 23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs
**Plans:** 1 plan in 5 waves (+ 3 sub-waves)
**File:** `.planning/phases/23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs/PLAN.md` (724 lines)

### Coverage Verification

| Metric | Result |
|--------|--------|
| P23-01 through P23-07 | ✅ 56 references across all waves |
| D1 through D5 | ✅ 11 references — all locked decisions honored |
| Deferred ideas (P25/P26) | ✅ 0 leakage — not in any task |
| P0 fixes | ✅ 3 fixes embedded in Wave 3A.1 + 3B.1 |
| Goal-backward must-haves | ✅ 21 success criteria (SC-01 to SC-21) |
| Threat model | ✅ STRIDE register (T-23-01 to T-23-04) |

### Wave Structure

| Wave | Sub-waves | Requirements | Tasks | Parallel? |
|------|-----------|-------------|-------|-----------|
| **Wave 1:** Code Fix | — | P23-01, P23-02 | 3 tasks | First (sequential) |
| **Wave 2:** Surface Docs | — | P23-03, P23-07 | 2 tasks | Parallel with W1 |
| **Wave 3A:** Coordination | 5 skills | P23-04 | 5 tasks | P0 fixes in 3A.1 |
| **Wave 3B:** Foundation | 1 skill | P23-05 | 1 task | After 3A |
| **Wave 3C:** Audit | 8 skills | P23-04 | 8 tasks | After 3B |
| **Wave 4:** Assessment | 3 tools | P23-06 | 4 tasks | After 3C |
| **Wave 5:** Gatekeeping | — | Cross-phase | 2 tasks | Last |

### Execution Order

**W1 → W2 (parallel max 2)** → **W3A** → **W3B** → **W3C** → **W4** → **W5**

### Key Design Decisions

1. **Wave 1 has 3 tasks** (session-api.ts expose, notification-handler.ts fix, tests update) — đủ small để fit trong ~40% context
2. **Wave 2 có thể parallel với Wave 1** — không file conflict (W1: `src/`, W2: `.opencode/skills/`)
3. **P0 fixes embedded** trong task 3A.1 (coordinating-loop repair) và task 3B.1 (power-on trim) — không subtask riêng
4. **Wave 3C có 8 tasks** nhưng mỗi task nhỏ (~audit+fix 1 skill) — tổng cộng fit trong context budget

### Next Steps

Execute: `/gsd-execute-phase 23`

`/clear` first — fresh context window (wave-based execution cần context mới cho mỗi wave)

<sub>Việc chạy tuần tự W1→W2→W3A→W3B→W3C→W4→W5 sẽ cần 7 session riêng biệt. Có thể reduce bằng cách parallel hóa W2 với W1 (không file conflict) và W4 với W3C (không dependency).</sub>
